notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Trea Turner. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd. Ronald Acuña Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Trea Turner. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd. Ronald Acuña Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Harris II pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Harris II doubles (4) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Justin Crawford. Dominic Smith scores. Mauricio Dubón scores.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Andrew Painter. Jorge Mateo scores.
